args.code:
import json, pandas as pd
import datetime as dt

# Load full case data
path = var_call_mcF8K8AIS9AepQHLZiXckb7m
with open(path, 'r') as f:
    cases = json.load(f)

cases_df = pd.DataFrame(cases)

# Parse dates
cases_df['createddate'] = pd.to_datetime(cases_df['createddate'])
cases_df['closeddate'] = pd.to_datetime(cases_df['closeddate'])

# Filter to past 6 quarters relative to 2022-10-26
anchor = pd.Timestamp('2022-10-26')
start = anchor - pd.DateOffset(months=18)
mask = (cases_df['createddate'] >= start) & (cases_df['createddate'] < anchor)
cases_df = cases_df[mask].copy()

# Compute resolution time in hours
cases_df['resolution_hours'] = (cases_df['closeddate'] - cases_df['createddate']).dt.total_seconds() / 3600.0

# Clean accountid (remove leading '#')
cases_df['accountid_clean'] = cases_df['accountid'].str.replace('#', '', regex=False)

result = cases_df[['accountid_clean','resolution_hours']].to_json(orient='records')

print("__RESULT__:")
print(result)

import json, pandas as pd
import datetime as dt

path = var_call_mcF8K8AIS9AepQHLZiXckb7m
with open(path, 'r') as f:
    cases = json.load(f)

cases_df = pd.DataFrame(cases)

cases_df['createddate'] = pd.to_datetime(cases_df['createddate'], utc=True)
cases_df['closeddate'] = pd.to_datetime(cases_df['closeddate'], utc=True)

anchor = pd.Timestamp('2022-10-26', tz='UTC')
start = anchor - pd.DateOffset(months=18)
mask = (cases_df['createddate'] >= start) & (cases_df['createddate'] < anchor)
cases_df = cases_df[mask].copy()

cases_df['resolution_hours'] = (cases_df['closeddate'] - cases_df['createddate']).dt.total_seconds() / 3600.0

cases_df['accountid_clean'] = cases_df['accountid'].str.replace('#', '', regex=False)

result = cases_df[['accountid_clean','resolution_hours']].to_json(orient='records')

print("__RESULT__:")
print(result)

import json, pandas as pd
import datetime as dt

path = var_call_mcF8K8AIS9AepQHLZiXckb7m
with open(path, 'r') as f:
    cases = json.load(f)

cases_df = pd.DataFrame(cases)

cases_df['createddate'] = pd.to_datetime(cases_df['createddate'], utc=True)
cases_df['closeddate'] = pd.to_datetime(cases_df['closeddate'], utc=True)

anchor = pd.Timestamp('2022-10-26', tz='UTC')
start = anchor - pd.DateOffset(months=18)
mask = (cases_df['createddate'] >= start) & (cases_df['createddate'] < anchor)
cases_df = cases_df[mask].copy()

cases_df['resolution_hours'] = (cases_df['closeddate'] - cases_df['createddate']).dt.total_seconds() / 3600.0

cases_df['accountid_clean'] = cases_df['accountid'].str.replace('#', '', regex=False)

result = cases_df[['accountid_clean','resolution_hours']].to_json(orient='records')

print("__RESULT__:")
print(result)

args.code:
import json, pandas as pd

# Load intermediate resolution data
res = json.loads(var_call_3FOAZD3yPRf3HhbItQh7CYxI)
res_df = pd.DataFrame(res)

# Load account states
acct = pd.DataFrame(var_call_4Avy7TDxIgGdLzcL4aFilKOy)
acct['Id_clean'] = acct['Id'].str.replace('#', '', regex=False)

# Join
merged = pd.merge(res_df, acct, left_on='accountid_clean', right_on='Id_clean', how='left')

# Filter to non-null 2-letter states
merged = merged[merged['state'].notna()]
merged = merged[merged['state'].str.len() == 2]

# Compute mean resolution time per state
state_stats = merged.groupby('state')['resolution_hours'].mean().reset_index()

# Get state with minimum resolution time
best = state_stats.sort_values('resolution_hours').iloc[0]['state']

import json as _json
out = _json.dumps(best)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(out)

import pandas as pd
import json

# Directly use stored variables without json.loads on them
res_df = pd.DataFrame(var_call_3FOAZD3yPRf3HhbItQh7CYxI)
acct = pd.DataFrame(var_call_4Avy7TDxIgGdLzcL4aFilKOy)

acct['Id_clean'] = acct['Id'].str.replace('#', '', regex=False)
merged = pd.merge(res_df, acct, left_on='accountid_clean', right_on='Id_clean', how='left')
merged = merged[merged['state'].notna()]
merged = merged[merged['state'].str.len() == 2]

state_stats = merged.groupby('state')['resolution_hours'].mean().reset_index()

best = state_stats.sort_values('resolution_hours').iloc[0]['state']

out = json.dumps(best)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(out)
